creator: ben@links.org
text:
configure: error: cURL 7.1.1 or newer required (cURL is available from http://curl.haxx.se/)
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to ag-freebsd@muc.de [maintainer] and attach the
"/construction/xports/misc/esniper/work/esniper-2-33-0/config.log" including
the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea
to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

The actual problem is libcurl wants libnghttp2, which appears to not be available under synth.
